programme.title: Small Achievable Goals
programme.desc: After a boost of confidence from guest star Jeanne Beker, Kris's lack of boundaries and Julie's controlling nature land the entire office in an HR seminar that threatens their camaraderie.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While in town for the surprise party, Patrick's parents get a surprise of their own; Moira gets coaxed into going to a soap opera convention with Alexis.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny fills in at the annual mayor's roast; David tries to stop Moira from finding out about Stevie and Patrick's dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Patrick and David go on a romantic hike; everyone panics over Johnny's health scare.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Stevie is nowhere to be found on opening night for Cabaret; David attempts to make a big announcement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Suspicious of Nathan Jr.'s behavior, Kate looks to Anne for advice, but the guidance she needs comes from a surprising source; a promising book proposal reunites rivals Kate and Sloane.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Jenny and MCP face the consequences of mixing business with pleasure; Kate makes a tough choice at work; there's a bumpy legal road ahead for Lionel.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Val invites her friends to plan her birthday; a conflict causes the party to go off the rails until Sloane turns things around.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate urges Nathan Jr. to loosen up and discover his wild side; MCP tries to solve problems the quick way, but Jenny isn't willing to cut corners; Anne struggles to keep her trademark anger in check.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon surprises Doris when Travis is away; Liam helps Paul with a land deal; Lara and Kristian try to impress Lara's dad.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother; Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it; Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of what is sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement; Jung pursues a new career and tries to get Janet involved; Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Jung shows Shannon his nurturing side while Chelsea and Gerald get in the way of Janet's summer plans; Appa is invited to lead a business seminar but is forced to share the spotlight.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry must find a guest speaker for Career Day who is better than Dwyer's; Robert has a fraternity reunion and tries to avoid getting sick.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Liz leads the Quiz Cup team; Bobbi teaches an uncomfortable health unit; Robert loses patience with Trudy over her constant joking.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi chaperone a field trip to the museum; Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: A chance encounter at a funeral parlor leads to Mark's first date; Mary tries to convince Dick to sell her an old station truck.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Mark's cello is taken by a gang of bullies, Fox begrudgingly comes to his rescue; Pop and Sister Rose take a stroll down memory lane when it's revealed they used to be an item.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis' romantic life, while Moira offends the townspeople in an interview with People Magazine.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's former "Sunrise Bay" producers show up with big news while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses attend the "Escape Room" portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, and the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is pushed out of her comfort zone by developments at work; Sloane doubles down as the hardest working executive with a baby; Anne bounces back from her attack better than ever.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate struggles to market a game-changing yet controversial pill, as Sloane's strategy puts her at odds with an author; while Jenny meets a dead-end, Anne meets a new friend in Anger Management.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: On her first day away from the baby, Sloane's maternal anxieties seep into the workplace; a disastrous commercial shoot brings Kate closer to her new client, as Anne goes on a risky field trip with hers.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: In an act of desperation, Jenny brings Zoe to visit a daunting figure from her past; Kate tries to revive her sex life and makes a pact with an amped-up Anne.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry must find a guest speaker for Career Day who is better than Dwyer's; Robert has a fraternity reunion and tries to avoid getting sick.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Liz leads the Quiz Cup team; Bobbi teaches an uncomfortable health unit; Robert loses patience with Trudy over her constant joking.

programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi chaperone a field trip to the museum; Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.
